# Swarm400 Micro46 Min8 Contract

## Micro 46
micro minContextUsageRatio defaults to 0.46 so tool-result clearing starts earlier

## Min 8
micro minContentTokens defaults to 8 so smaller bulky tool results clear sooner

## Swarm 400
swarm expert bodies default to 400 chars, total 12k, inline 70 for denser multi-agent handoffs
